title: BHN — Data Health
description: Data layer: storage, collector freshness, row counts, and volume trends across all eventhorizon domains. The freshness table catches dead collectors the moment they stop writing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pg_database_size('eventhorizon') AS value
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
SELECT SUM(n_live_tup) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables
SELECT used_pct AS value FROM node_disk_stats WHERE mount_point = '/mnt/eh-nvme-hot' ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT used_pct AS value FROM node_disk_stats WHERE mount_point = '/mnt/eh-hdd-cold' ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.relname AS "Table", pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(s.relid)) AS "Total Size", pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(s.relid)) AS "Table Size", pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(s.relid) - pg_relation_size(s.relid)) AS "Index Size", s.n_live_tup AS "Live Rows", pg_total_relation_size(s.relid) AS size_bytes FROM pg_stat_user_tables s ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(s.relid) DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Dead Collectors
panels.description: Sources with last record older than their expected cadence threshold. Any value > 0 = immediate attention required.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (
  SELECT MAX(fetched_at) AS t FROM macro_daily HAVING MAX(fetched_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(date::timestamptz) FROM market_daily HAVING MAX(date::timestamptz) < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 days'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(measured_at) FROM energy_prices HAVING MAX(measured_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(measured_at) FROM agriculture_prices HAVING MAX(measured_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(fetched_at) FROM weather_snapshots HAVING MAX(fetched_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 days'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(detected_at) FROM security_events HAVING MAX(detected_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT MAX(scraped_at) FROM pop_reports HAVING MAX(scraped_at) < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
) dead
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX(detected_at)) * 1000 AS value FROM security_events
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MIN(date::timestamptz)) * 1000 AS value FROM macro_daily
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / 24.0, 1) AS value FROM security_events WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM market_daily WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pop_reports

panels.title: Collector Freshness — All Sources
panels.description: Status auto-computed per source cadence. ACTIVE = within expected window. OUTAGE = past cadence + grace. MAINTENANCE = manually set. To flag: UPDATE collector_config SET status_override = 'maintenance', override_note = 'reason' WHERE source_name = '...'

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  f.domain AS "Domain",
  f.source AS "Source",
  f.table_name AS "Table",
  f.last_record AS "Last Record",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - f.last_record)) / 3600, 1) AS "Hours Ago",
  f.cadence AS "Cadence",
  COALESCE(c.override_note, '') AS "Note",
  CASE
    WHEN c.status_override = 'maintenance' THEN 'MAINTENANCE'
    WHEN f.last_record IS NULL THEN 'OUTAGE'
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - f.last_record)) / 3600 <= (COALESCE(c.cadence_hours, 48) + COALESCE(c.grace_hours, 6)) THEN 'ACTIVE'
    ELSE 'OUTAGE'
  END AS "Status"
FROM (
  SELECT 'Macro' AS domain, 'FRED (macro_daily)' AS source, 'macro_daily' AS table_name, MAX(fetched_at) AS last_record, 'Daily 17:00 ET' AS cadence FROM macro_daily
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Market', 'Alpaca ETF (market_daily)', 'market_daily', MAX(date::timestamptz), 'Daily 16:30 ET (weekdays)' FROM market_daily
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Market', 'Regime Classifier', 'market_regimes', MAX(date::timestamptz), 'Daily 17:15 ET' FROM market_regimes
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Market', 'Sentiment Collector', 'market_sentiment', MAX(date::timestamptz), 'Daily 17:30 ET' FROM market_sentiment
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Market', 'Finnhub Earnings', 'earnings_data', MAX(created_at), 'Monthly' FROM earnings_data
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Market', 'Finnhub Analysts', 'analyst_data', MAX(created_at), 'Monthly' FROM analyst_data
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Energy', 'EIA Energy Prices', 'energy_prices', MAX(measured_at), 'Weekly' FROM energy_prices
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Agriculture', 'USDA Agriculture', 'agriculture_prices', MAX(measured_at), 'Monthly' FROM agriculture_prices
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Weather', 'OpenWeather', 'weather_snapshots', MAX(fetched_at), 'Hourly' FROM weather_snapshots
  UNION ALL SELECT 'News', 'NewsAPI', 'news_articles', MAX(fetched_at), 'Every 30min' FROM news_articles
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Security', 'Suricata/CrowdSec', 'security_events', MAX(detected_at), 'Continuous' FROM security_events
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Security', 'fail2ban', 'fail2ban_events', MAX(timestamp), 'Continuous' FROM fail2ban_events
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Security', 'CrowdSec', 'crowdsec_decisions', MAX(measured_at), 'Continuous' FROM crowdsec_decisions
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Trading', 'Alpaca Paper Trades', 'paper_trades', MAX(created_at), 'Market hours' FROM paper_trades
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Trading', 'Strategy Signals', 'signals_log', MAX(evaluated_at), 'Market hours' FROM signals_log
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Trading', 'Reconciliation Daemon', 'reconciliation_heartbeat', MAX(beat_at), 'Every 5min (NJ)' FROM reconciliation_heartbeat
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Collectibles', 'CGC Pop Scraper', 'pop_reports', MAX(scraped_at), 'Weekly Sun 03:00 UTC' FROM pop_reports
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Collectibles', 'eBay Sold Comps', 'sold_listings', MAX(inserted_at), 'Manual / n8n' FROM sold_listings
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Collectibles', 'eBay Active Listings', 'ebay_listings', MAX(last_seen_at), 'Manual / n8n' FROM ebay_listings
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AI', 'HORIZON Memory', 'memories', MAX(created_at), 'On conversation' FROM memories
  UNION ALL SELECT 'AI', 'HORIZON Tokens', 'agent_token_log', MAX(occurred_at), 'On conversation' FROM agent_token_log
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Infrastructure', 'WireGuard Stats', 'wg_peer_stats', MAX(measured_at), 'Every 5min' FROM wg_peer_stats
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Infrastructure', 'Node Resources', 'node_resource_stats', MAX(measured_at), 'Every 5min' FROM node_resource_stats
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Infrastructure', 'Docker Stats', 'container_stats', MAX(measured_at), 'Every 5min' FROM container_stats
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Infrastructure', 'n8n Executions', 'n8n_execution_stats', MAX(started_at), 'Every 5min' FROM n8n_execution_stats
) f
LEFT JOIN collector_config c ON c.source_name = f.source
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN c.status_override = 'maintenance' THEN 2
    WHEN f.last_record IS NULL THEN 1
    WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - f.last_record)) / 3600 > (COALESCE(c.cadence_hours,48) + COALESCE(c.grace_hours,6)) THEN 1
    ELSE 3
  END ASC,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - f.last_record)) DESC NULLS FIRST

SELECT table_name AS "Table", row_count AS "Rows" FROM (
  SELECT 'market_daily' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM market_daily
  UNION ALL SELECT 'macro_daily', COUNT(*) FROM macro_daily
  UNION ALL SELECT 'market_regimes', COUNT(*) FROM market_regimes
  UNION ALL SELECT 'market_sentiment', COUNT(*) FROM market_sentiment
  UNION ALL SELECT 'earnings_data', COUNT(*) FROM earnings_data
  UNION ALL SELECT 'analyst_data', COUNT(*) FROM analyst_data
  UNION ALL SELECT 'energy_prices', COUNT(*) FROM energy_prices
  UNION ALL SELECT 'agriculture_prices', COUNT(*) FROM agriculture_prices
  UNION ALL SELECT 'news_articles', COUNT(*) FROM news_articles
  UNION ALL SELECT 'weather_snapshots', COUNT(*) FROM weather_snapshots
  UNION ALL SELECT 'security_events', COUNT(*) FROM security_events
  UNION ALL SELECT 'anomalies', COUNT(*) FROM anomalies
  UNION ALL SELECT 'fail2ban_events', COUNT(*) FROM fail2ban_events
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_trades', COUNT(*) FROM paper_trades
  UNION ALL SELECT 'signals_log', COUNT(*) FROM signals_log
  UNION ALL SELECT 'pop_reports', COUNT(*) FROM pop_reports
  UNION ALL SELECT 'sold_listings', COUNT(*) FROM sold_listings
  UNION ALL SELECT 'ebay_listings', COUNT(*) FROM ebay_listings
  UNION ALL SELECT 'memories', COUNT(*) FROM memories
  UNION ALL SELECT 'wg_peer_stats', COUNT(*) FROM wg_peer_stats
  UNION ALL SELECT 'node_resource_stats', COUNT(*) FROM node_resource_stats
) t ORDER BY row_count DESC

SELECT s.relname AS "Table", s.n_live_tup AS "Live Rows", pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(s.relid)) AS "Disk Size", s.n_tup_ins AS "Total Inserts", s.n_tup_upd AS "Updates", s.n_tup_del AS "Deletes", (s.n_tup_ins - s.n_tup_del) AS "Net Growth", pg_total_relation_size(s.relid) AS size_bytes FROM pg_stat_user_tables s ORDER BY s.n_live_tup DESC

panels.title: Security Events — Daily Volume (90 days)
panels.description: Sudden spike = anomaly or scan campaign. Flatline = collector died.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', detected_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Events / Day" FROM security_events WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Ingest Rate by Domain (last 30 days)
panels.description: Heartbeat of your data operation. Gaps = dead collector. Market gaps on weekends = expected.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', date::timestamptz) AS time, 'market' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM market_daily WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', fetched_at) AS time, 'macro' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM macro_daily WHERE fetched_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', detected_at) AS time, 'security' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM security_events WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', scraped_at) AS time, 'pop_reports' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM pop_reports WHERE scraped_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', scraped_at) AS time, 'sold_comps' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM sold_listings WHERE scraped_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, 'paper_trades' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM paper_trades WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Bans / Day" FROM fail2ban_events WHERE action = 'ban' AND timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: ⚠ DB Size Over Time — Setup Required

options.content:
## DB Size History Not Yet Available

To enable the DB size-over-time chart, run this on **PC LA CONSOLE** once:

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS db_size_log (
    recorded_at  TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    size_bytes   BIGINT NOT NULL
);
GRANT SELECT ON db_size_log TO grafana_reader;
```

Then add a cron on LA to log it nightly:

```bash
echo "0 0 * * * root sudo -u postgres psql -d eventhorizon -c \"INSERT INTO db_size_log (size_bytes) VALUES (pg_database_size('eventhorizon'));\"" >> /etc/cron.d/bhn-db-size
```

Once data accumulates, replace this panel with a time-series chart.
